completed_steps.summary: Classified as monolith with 1 part, project_type=web (React 18 SPA)
Found 7 existing docs from March 15 scan plus 2 additional (adaptive-pwa-guide, ui-contract)
Tech stack: React 18 + Vite 6, useReducer state, inline CSS with design tokens, custom SVG charts, Playwright
Deep scan: 70 source files, ~156 state keys, 80 MODEL_KEYS, 17 model modules, 14 charts, 14 components, 14 panels
Source tree documented with 8 critical folders
Dev setup and deployment documented (npm scripts, Vite build, test harness)
Architecture doc written: state management, model layer (3 tiers), UI layer, data flow, testing strategy
All supporting docs written: project-overview, component-inventory (39 UI + 19 model), development-guide
Master index generated with links to all 7 docs

findings.project_classification: Monolith, 1 part, React 18 SPA with Vite 6
findings.technology_stack: React 18 (JSX), Vite 6, useReducer state, inline CSS with design tokens, custom SVG charts, Playwright
findings.components: 70 source files: 17 model (incl. historical data + tests), 14 charts (2 utils + 12 components), 14 shared components, 14 panels (8 panels + 6 tabs), 3 content, 3 UI utils, 2 testing, 3 root files
findings.state_management: useReducer with ~156 state keys, 80 MODEL_KEYS for scenario save/load, useDeferredValue for performance isolation, setter cache for stable callbacks
findings.model_layer: 17 modules: core projection (72-month sim), Monte Carlo (500 sims), goal evaluation (5 types), ERN closed-form SWR, adaptive PWA strategies (3 types), retirement income modeling (SS/survivor phases), scenario levers, monthly check-in, narrative story builder, export, vesting, formatters, constants, Shiller returns (1871-2025)
findings.features: Monthly check-in tracking, goal-based planning with MC success rates, scenario save/load/compare, 4 experience modes (planner/present/sarah/dad), retirement ERN SWR + adaptive PWA, sequence-of-returns risk, primary levers console, narrative bridge chart
